goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should 'leave after 01:30' and should depart from 'saffron brasserie'.
The taxi should go to 'whipple museum of the history of science'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

book.destination: whipple museum of the history of science
